Author: BlueWaveXIV
Name: AutoList
Description: AutoList turns retainer Market Board chores into supervised AutoList, AutoRefresh, and AutoTidy workflows with a small in-game tray that lights up when your character is ready to start.
Punchline: Turn retainer listing from market-board chore into one-click momentum.
Changelog:
Changed AutoTidy to compact active listings upward through selected AutoList retainers instead of using a sparse-retainer threshold.
AutoTidy now calculates the ideal top-packed layout and retrieves only the surplus listings needed to reach it.
AutoTidy handoff ignores the Special Attention retainer preference so compaction stays top-down.
Removed the sparse-retainer threshold from settings and updated AutoTidy UI/help text.
